description_long: This is a decorative wall-mounted sconce featuring two upward-facing lamp arms, each supporting a cylindrical lampshade with a subtle vertical ribbed texture and a slightly distressed, off-white finish. The central body of the sconce is adorned with ornate, leaf-like motifs that curve outward, adding an elegant and classical touch. The arms are gently curved and mimic the look of wrought iron or painted metal, with a weathered patina that suggests vintage or shabby-chic styling. The shades appear to be made of a translucent fabric or frosted material, diffusing light softly. The base and mounting plate are compact and rounded, designed to sit flush against a wall. This fixture is both functional and decorative, suitable for adding ambient lighting and visual interest to urban exteriors or interiors.
description: A vintage-style wall sconce with two curved arms, ribbed cylindrical shades, and ornate leaf motifs in a distressed off-white finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing both lamp arms, shades, and the central decorative leaf motifs clearly.
description_view_1: Side angle highlighting the depth of the arms and the cylindrical shape of the shades.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the mounting base and the symmetrical arrangement of the arms and leaves.
description_view_3: Opposite side angle, again emphasizing the arm curvature and the texture of the shades.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and shabby-chic with ornate leaf motifs, curved arms, and distressed finishes, evoking a classical European aesthetic.
